# Spider League

> Snap a photo of any spider, get AI-generated battle stats, build a collection, and compete in weekly Spider League matchups with friends.

Spider League is a web app where players photograph real spiders, get them identified and statted by AI, then battle them in turn-based matches and weekly rankings. Players can also form private "friend pods" to compete in their own mini-leagues.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Spider League, recent battles, and weekly rankings.
- [Upload a Spider](/upload): Photograph and submit a new spider to your collection.
- [My Collection](/collection): Manage your roster of spider fighters.
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Top-ranked trainers by Power and XP.
- [Battle History](/battle-history): Past battles, statistics, and challenge records.
- [Roadmap](/roadmap): Upcoming features and ideas under consideration.
- [Shop](/shop): Official Spider League merchandise.

## Optional

- [Sign In](/auth): Sign in or create an account.
